subcodes.first_line: God willing, may the eternal Kawthar of divine knowledge ever flow forth from the hand of grace and bounty of the Everlasting Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لازال کوثر معارف بیزوال حضرت لایزال را از ید عنایت و مکرمت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @prayer for nearness to God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
